name: IRPF Brasil
description_en: Specialist assistant for Brazil's personal income tax (IRPF, 2026 cycle / 2025 base year)—covers filing obligations, pre-filled returns, REVAR/B3, fixed income, capital gains (GCAP), offshore (Law 14.754), special cases, and the 2027 changes, with a focus on audit, compliance, and optimization.
description_zh: 巴西个人所得税(IRPF,2026 申报年度 / 2025 基准年)专项助手——覆盖申报义务、预填报、REVAR/B3、固定收益、资本利得(GCAP)、境外资产(14.754 号法)、特殊情形与 2027 年变更,聚焦审计、合规与优化。
long_en: Guides Brazilian residents through the annual IRPF return with deep coverage of edge cases, explicitly positioned to assist alongside—not replace—the Receita Federal's official program.
long_zh: 引导巴西居民完成年度 IRPF 申报,对各类边角情形覆盖深入,并明确定位为辅助而非替代联邦税务局的官方程序。
sec_note_en: Handles sensitive personal tax data and gives compliance guidance, not professional tax advice; confirm with the Receita Federal's official program and a qualified accountant before filing.
sec_note_zh: 会处理敏感的个人税务数据并提供合规指引,而非专业税务意见;申报前请以联邦税务局官方程序与合格会计师为准。
